title: 菊花賞の後に・大団円

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki takes first in the Kikuka Sho. The
audience is thrilled that she managed to
overcome the limitations of her distance aptitude
and conquer a long-distance race. Their
expectations rise ever higher.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, she asks to participate in the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen, a 1,200-meter G1 turf
sprint.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm puzzled by her sudden change of heart, but
I'm sure she has a reason.
